location_name: Busan City / Unmanned Return Center Branch 1
main_info_1: Let's do it together! Gear Deposit System
guide_caution_text: Please use the kiosk and scanner in the designated order for everyone's convenience. If the device is damaged, others cannot use it.
pass_modal_desc: We will proceed with mobile identity verification (PASS).
pass_modal_desc2: Please confirm the verification request in your PASS app.
msg_loading_rentals:
Loading rental list...
Please wait a moment.
method_title_main: Unmanned fishing gear return is done in 4 simple steps.
method_step1_desc: Press 'Start Return', then scan your fisher QR code on the kiosk scanner.
method_step2_desc: Enter the total number of gears, then scan the tag barcode attached to each gear using the scanner and sensor.
method_step3_desc: Once tag auth is complete, the door opens. Slowly put the authenticated gear into the slot.
method_step4_desc: Once input is done, check the return details and deposit refund amount on the monitor.
faq_a2_sub: Please wipe the tag clean and try again.
deposit_instruction_strong: Put the gear in the box and press Capture.
policy_title_1: Let's do it together! Gear Deposit System"
policy_text1: refunds a certain deposit amount after verifying the tag attached to the gear when fishers bring used gear to the designated center.
policy_text2: you can conveniently return waste fishing gear.
policy_text3: Thank you for joining us in making our ocean clean through proper gear collection.
faq_a1: Please scan clearly again so the phone QR code fits the scanner. If it fails continuously, use 'Retry' or 'Alternate Auth'.
faq_a2_strong: Wipe the tag clean and try again
faq_a2: The tag might be contaminated with seawater or debris. Please do so. If it continues to fail, contact the manager.
faq_q3: I have an issue with the device or need help.
faq_a3: If an issue occurs during kiosk use, please contact the number shown on the screen immediately.
auth_register_guide: Member registration is available via the dedicated app or website.
auth_instruction: Open the app and scan the barcode in 'My Info' on the scanner.
auth_fail_popup_message:
Please scan the QR code or barcode
clearly once again.
auth_success_popup_loading_text:
Preparing return process..
Please wait a moment
alt_auth_alert_invalid_format: Check input format (DOB 8 digits, Phone 10-11 digits, PIN 4 digits).
alt_auth_fail_popup_message:
Information not found.
Please check again.
error_gear_not_owner: This gear is not currently rented by you.
error_gear_unknown: This phrase has already been scanned.
tagging_instruction_top: Enter the quantity of gear to return.
tagging_alert_network_error: Server communication error. Please try again later.
gearscan_fail_popup_message:
Cannot recognize barcode.
Wipe clean and retry
or contact manager.
gearscan_success_popup_message:
Gear barcode has been
verified successfully.
gearscan_success_popup_loading_text:
Preparing for input..
Please wait a moment
tagscan_fail_popup_message:
Wipe tag clean and
retry or
contact manager.
tagscan_success_popup_message:

verified successfully.
tagscan_success_popup_loading_text:

tagscan_instruction:
Hold the reader and
scan the Gear Tag
gearscan_popup_message: Currently {{totalCount}} gears registered.<1/>Do you have more gear to return?
gearscan_complete_instruction: Check gear and press<1/>Tag Auth Complete button
error_server_communication: Server communication error. Please try again later.
deposit_webcam_error: Cannot start webcam. Check camera permissions.
deposit_alert_network_error: Server communication error. Please try again later.
deposit_alert_capture_error: Capture error: Video or canvas element not found.
deposit_instruction_strong: Put discarded fishing gear into the inlet and<1/>
deposit_popup_message: Insert more gear?<1/>Press 'No' to finish return.
deposit_alert_no_image: No image captured. Must insert at least 1 gear.
deposit_alert_no_items: No gear to return. Please scan gear first.
deposit_confirm_instruction: Check returned gear and press Finish Return.
completion_error_no_session: Session not found. Please restart from Step 1.
error_gear_not_owner: This gear is not currently rented by you.
INIT_01: Hello. This is the Unmanned Fishing Gear Return System. Touch the screen to start.
INIT_02: To return gear, please press the 'Start Return' button on the screen.
AUTH_01: For fisher auth, open the app and scan the barcode on the scanner.
AUTH_03: Auth failed. Align the QR code with the center of the scanner.
AUTH_04: Hold the sensor and scan the tag attached to the gear.
AUTH_05: Gear verified. Moving to scan step.
AUTH_06: Tag not recognized. Wipe surface clean, press 'Retry', and scan again. If failed, contact manager.
AUTH_07: Scan the gear barcode. Please scan one by one.
AUTH_08: Gear confirmed. Moving to input step.
AUTH_09: Recognized gear info is invalid. Please check again.
AUTH_10: Already processed gear. Scan another one.
AUTH_12: Scan complete. Wait for the slot to open and follow instructions.
PROC_02: Capturing gear. Put gear in slot and press capture button.
PROC_04: Do you have additional gear to return?
COMP_01: Check returned gear, then press 'Return Complete' button.
COMP_02: Thank you for using. Thank you for helping make the ocean clean.
DEPOSIT_H_01: Securely fasten the trap gear to the open lock and close the door.
DEPOSIT_D_01: When the slot opens, put the gear inside. Door closes automatically after input.
DEPOSIT_G_01: When the slot opens, put the sack inside. Door closes automatically after input.
STATUS_G_01: Compressing and banding sack. This is for storage efficiency.
rentals_fetch_error: Failed to fetch rented gear information.
detail_fetch_error: Failed to fetch detailed barcode information.
duplicate_barcode_warning: This barcode has already been scanned.
pass_modal_helper_text: ※ If the popup is blocked, please click the 'Retry' button below.
auth_register_guide: Membership registration is available via the app or web.
privacy_third_party_main: To process waste gear returns and deposit refunds,
privacy_third_party_sub: we intend to provide personal information as follows.
privacy_tp_item: • Items: Name, Phone Number, Date of Birth
privacy_tp_ask: Do you agree to provide your personal information to a third party as above?
privacy_consent_desc: To use the identity verification service, please agree to the required terms below.
privacy_term1_label: [Required] Consent to Collection/Use of Personal Info
privacy_term1_detail: Information entered for identity verification (Name, Phone No, etc.) will be collected and used via authentication agencies (e.g., NICE).
privacy_term2_label: [Required] Consent to Processing of Unique ID Info
privacy_term2_detail: I agree to the processing of unique identification information, such as Resident Registration Number, based on relevant laws.

Please scan the
Gear Deposit Tag barcode.
error_barcode_not_found: Barcode not found in rental list.
